title: forwarded_ports.json — host-global port allocation registry
description: Host-wide record of every active forwarded host port across all `deacon up --auto-forward` forwarders. Lives at {user_data_folder}/forwarded_ports.json. Written atomically (temp file + rename) under an advisory file lock. Every host_port is unique across the whole array.

entries.description: One entry per active host-port allocation. host_port values MUST be unique across this array.

host_port.description: Allocated loopback host port (always >= 1024; privileged ports are remapped per FR-009a). Unique across the registry.

container_id.description: Full id of the owning container.

container_port.description: Source TCP port inside the container.

workspace.description: Canonical workspace path of the owning devcontainer (for reporting/disambiguation).

pid.description: Process id of the owning forwarder; used to prune stale entries when the process is dead (FR-016).

label.description: Effective port label from portsAttributes, if any.
